summary: Iteration 24 testing completed successfully. All P0/P1/P2 features tested and working. Fixed a bug where login label i18n was not working (t.lang was undefined, changed to use lang prop). Admin login via /login → /admin redirect now works correctly after fixing token storage sync between UnifiedLogin and Admin pages.
updated_files: /app/frontend/src/App.js - Fixed t.lang → lang prop for i18n login labels in Nav, Hero, AppDev, Pricing, Contact, Footer components
/app/frontend/src/pages/Admin.js - Added nx_auth localStorage check for token sync with UnifiedLogin
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 24 features all working: 1) Login button 'Anmelden' in public header (desktop+mobile+burger menu) with i18n (DE/NL/EN), 2) /login page with home-link, legal links, role detection (admin→password, customer→magic link, unknown→error), 3) Admin login via /login redirects to /admin panel, 4) Role separation (customer JWT blocked from admin endpoints with 403), 5) Invoice PDF discount/special_items code verified. Fixed bugs: t.lang→lang prop for i18n, nx_auth token sync in Admin.js.

P0_login_button_header.desktop: ✅ Login button 'Anmelden' with icon visible between language switcher and CTA
P0_login_button_header.mobile_header: ✅ Login icon visible in mobile header

P1_login_page.legal_links: ✅ Startseite, Impressum, Datenschutz, AGB at bottom
P1_login_page.admin_flow: ✅ Admin email → password step with 'Interner Zugang' badge → login → redirect to /admin
P1_login_page.customer_flow: ✅ Customer email → magic link sent step with 'Zugangslink gesendet'
P1_login_page.unknown_email: ✅ Error message 'Kein Konto für diese E-Mail gefunden'

P2_auth_ux.admin_panel_functional: ✅ Admin panel loads with sidebar and dashboard after login
P2_auth_ux.role_separation: ✅ Customer JWT blocked from admin endpoints with 403

bugs_fixed_by_testing_agent.issue: Login label i18n not working - t.lang was undefined
bugs_fixed_by_testing_agent.fix: Changed Nav, Hero, AppDev, Pricing, Contact, Footer components to receive 'lang' prop and use it instead of t.lang

bugs_fixed_by_testing_agent.issue: Admin panel showing login form after /login redirect because token was stored in nx_auth but Admin.js only checked nx_admin_token
bugs_fixed_by_testing_agent.fix: Added check for nx_auth localStorage in Admin.js token initialization
